course_title: MEDICAL DEVICES ECOSYSTEM: THE PATH TO PRODUCT
description: Development of medical devices for therapeutic or diagnostic purposes. Gap analysis, market analysis, reimbursement/distribution, regulatory approval, and manufacturing/supply chain development. Refinement and presentation of design ideas and corporate strategy within a team setting. Case studies of device design/manufacture including supply chain, intellectual property, pre-clinical testing, U.S. and European regulatory pathways and clinical trial design.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: B M E 402or concurrent enrollment, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
